results.title: Beyond the past: How Spain won again
results.description: When Miguel de Cervantes wrote that "too much sanity may be madness," may be football was the last thing on his mind. Yet the history of Spanish football often seems to prove his point.

results.title: Days of '76 ends first performance
results.description: DEADWOOD — The 104th annual Days of '76 rodeo completed its first PRCA rodeo performance Tuesday night at the Days of '76 grounds. Top honors are up for grabs in 8 events.

results.title: Andoni Iraola now has something Arne Slot and Jurgen Klopp never did at Liverpool
results.description: Andoni Iraola has been in charge of Liverpool for a matter of weeks and has already enjoyed something not seen at Anfield since 2010

results.title: Springboks' midfield options: Who should start against the All Blacks in first Test?
results.description: The Springbok lineup to play New Zealand in the Rugby's Greatest Rivalry series is taking shape.

results.title: 'I made some crazy plays': Shedeur Sanders drops candid take over his rookie Season
results.description: From dominating college football to navigating one of the NFL’s toughest rookie seasons, Shedeur Sanders has seen both extremes. Entering Year 2, the Browns quarterback has sent a direct message about the adversity that shaped him.

results.title: SEC's move to 9-game conference schedules pauses some rivalries and awakens others

results.title: MLB players propose expanded draft eligibility in another sign of looming labor confrontation
results.description: Baseball players have proposed expanding eligibility for the amateur draft rather than decreasing it, maintaining 20 rounds of selections and moving it back to June. It's another signal the sport is heading to a labor confrontation this offseason. The union...
